news.headline: Russia's Dmitriev: Russian and US officials have separate discussion on future economic cooperation, including global energy prices.
BHP saw a 23% drop in earnings, reporting $5.08 billion for the half-year ending December 31, 2024, due to iron ore challenges. Dividend cut to $0.50.
news.summary: BHP reported half-year earnings of $5.08 billion, down 23% from the previous year, as the iron ore market faced challenges. Despite this, CEO Mike Henry noted the firm's operational resilience. Iron ore EBITDA fell from $9.7 billion to $7.2 billion due to a 22% decline in realized prices to $81.11 per ton. Production increased by 1% to 131 million tons on an equity basis, but revenue dropped by 7.5% to $25.176 billion. The board declared an interim dividend of $0.50 per share, lower than last year's $0.72 per share.

news.headline: Waystar reports strong results for Q4 2024 and FY 2024. FY 2024 revenue: $944M (up 19% YoY), Q4 revenue growth: 18% YoY, Q4 net income: $19.1M. Adjusted EBITDA FY 2024: $383M (up 15% YoY).urlpatterns: 100.characters.
news.summary: Waystar Holding Corp. reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024, with a revenue of $944 million for the fiscal year, marking a 19% increase year-over-year. In Q4, revenue saw an 18% growth compared to the previous year. Q4 net income was $19.1 million, while non-GAAP net income was $52.1 million. The company reported a net loss of $19.1 million for the fiscal year, representing a 62.7% improvement year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA for fiscal year 2024 was $383 million, up 15% YoY. The company provided guidance for fiscal year 2025, expecting total revenue between $1.0 billion and $1.016 billion, adjusted EBITDA between $399 million and $407 million, non-GAAP net income between $237 million and $243 million, and diluted non-GAAP net income per share between $1.29 and $1.32. The company's financial results will be discussed in a conference call, and interested parties can access the webcast on Waystar's website. Non-GAAP financial measures were included to supplement GAAP statements for a comprehensive financial performance analysis.

news.headline: Blackbaud reports 2024 Q4 results: GAAP revenue $302.2M, non-GAAP recurring revenue $296.2M, GAAP loss $330.8M, and aims to become Rule of 45 company by 2030. Full-year 2024 GAAP revenue $1.2B, non-GAAP EBITDA $388.9M, net cash flow $228.8M. 2025 outlook includes revenue $1.115B - $1.125B, EBITDA margin 34.9% - 35.9%. Non-GAAP EPS $4.16 - $4.35, adjusted free cash flow $185M - $195M. Stock repurchase program remains with $645M remaining. Visit Blackbaud's site for more info.
news.summary: Blackbaud, a software provider for social impact, reported positive financial results for Q4 and full-year 2024. In Q4, GAAP total revenue was $302.2 million, up 2.4%, with GAAP recurring revenue at $296.2 million, up 3.1%. Non-GAAP net income was $54.4 million, and adjusted EBITDA was $102.2 million. For the full year, total revenue was $1.2 billion, up 4.5%, with GAAP recurring revenue at $1.1 billion, up 5.4%. Non-GAAP net income was $210.7 million. The company also provided 2025 financial guidance, including revenue of $1.115 billion to $1.125 billion and adjusted EBITDA margin of 34.9% to 35.9%. Blackbaud marked several milestones, including divesting EVERFI and announcing partnerships for social impact. For more details, visit www.blackbaud.com/newsroom.

news.headline: Vulcan Materials reports Q4 and full year 2024 results with total revenues at $7.4B, Adjusted EBITDA at $2.1B, and net earnings at $912M. CEO expects double-digit earnings growth in 2025. Market outlook remains positive with projections for volume growth, price improvements, and cost management strategies. Acquisition and capital allocation activities continue to support growth. Management anticipates strong performance in the coming year. ((*Word count: 98*))
news.summary: Vulcan Materials Company, the largest construction aggregates producer in the US, reported financial results for Q4 2024. Total revenues for the quarter were $1.854 billion, with a gross profit of $537 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $550 million, with a margin of 29.7%. Net earnings attributable to Vulcan were $294 million. The Aggregates segment saw a 15% increase in gross profit, with cash gross profit per ton at $11.50. Vulcan completed strategic acquisitions in 2024 and returned $313 million to shareholders. The outlook for 2025 includes a 19% growth in Adjusted EBITDA, double-digit growth in Aggregates cash gross profit per ton, and other positive projections. Annual revenue was $7.418 billion, with a gross profit of $2 billion. Vulcan's stock is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol VMC.

news.headline: Cambridge GaN Devices secures $32M for global growth in power semiconductor industry, led by strategic investor.
news.summary: A company based in Cambridge, England, called Cambridge GaN Devices (CGD), specializing in GaN power devices, has recently concluded a Series C funding round, raising an impressive $32 million. The primary investment came from a strategic investor, with additional contributions from British Patient Capital and continuing support from current investors like Parkwalk, BGF, Cambridge Innovation Capital (CIC), Foresight Group, and IQ Capital. The company's focus on GaN technology is revolutionizing power electronics.

news.headline: Acquisition deal: One Equity Partners to buy Wheeler Fleet Solutions.
news.summary: The latest data reveals that the economy grew by 5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations of a 3.8% growth. Unemployment has fallen to 4.2%, the lowest rate in ten years. Additionally, inflation remains steady at 2.5%. Experts attribute the strong economic performance to increased consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing output. Analysts predict continued growth in the coming months.

news.headline: Southwest faces first nonvoluntary layoffs after 53 years.
Report projects Spain's data center market value to grow from USD 2.25 billion in 2024 to USD 4.30 billion by 2030 at a CAGR of 11.40%.
news.summary: A report titled "Spain Data Center Market - Investment Analysis & Growth Opportunities 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The data center market in Spain had a value of USD 2.25 billion in 2024 and is forecasted to reach USD 4.30 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.40%. A notable trend in the market is companies obtaining renewable energy for their operations, such as Nabiax powering its data centers with 100% renewable sources.

news.headline: DocGo CEO to speak at TD Cowen Health Care Conference on March 5th, 11:10-11:40 AM ET. Webcast available on DocGo's website. Nasdaq: DCGO.
news.summary: In New York, DocGo Inc. (Nasdaq: DCGO) disclosed that its CEO, Lee Bienstock, will take part in individual meetings at the TD Cowen 45th Annual Health Care Conference on March 5th. Additionally, Bienstock is scheduled to present from 11:10 to 11:40 AM ET on the same day. A webcast of the presentation can be accessed on DocGo's investor relations site at https://ir.docgo.com/. DocGo Inc. is a prominent provider of technology-driven mobile health services.

news.headline: Investors are heavily wagering on a substantial drop in volatility in the market.
AREP Fund IV closes at $309M, exceeding target. Demonstrates continued growth in the real estate investment sector.
news.summary: An institutional real estate fund manager and operating company, American Real Estate Partners (AREP), based in McLean, Virginia, revealed the completion of its fourth real estate GP fund, AREP Strategic Opportunity Fund IV ("Fund IV"). This fund has garnered $309 million in equity commitments, showcasing substantial growth following the close of fundraising for AREP's third investment fund in 2022. The success in capital raising for Fund IV highlights AREP's proficiency in recognizing and molding investment opportunities.

news.headline: AZEK Company acquires Northwest Polymers to expand recycling in Pacific Northwest; based in Oregon. NYSE: AZEK.
news.summary: Chicago-based AZEK Company Inc. (NYSE: AZEK), a top manufacturer of sustainable outdoor living products like TimberTech® Decking and Railing, Versatex®, AZEK Trim®, and StruXure® pergolas, has acquired Northwest Polymers. Northwest Polymers is a renowned company in Oregon specializing in post-industrial and post-commercial plastic recycling. This acquisition marks AZEK's expansion in the recycling sector.

news.headline: Tony James' firm is raised $370M for private equity investments.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the number of confirmed cases of the recent viral outbreak has surged to over 10,000, with a significant increase in the number of fatalities, now surpassing 500. Health officials emphasize the importance of following preventive measures such as hand hygiene and wearing face masks to curb the spread of the virus. In response to the escalating situation, authorities are implementing stricter quarantine measures in heavily affected regions. Additionally, efforts are underway to ramp up testing capacity and allocate resources to support the healthcare system in managing the influx of patients. The public is urged to stay informed through reliable sources and to cooperate with health guidelines to mitigate the further spread of the virus.

news.headline: A.R.I. partners with Hypereon Labs in St. Petersburg, FL to drive AI innovation via strategic debt financing.
news.summary: A tech company based in St. Petersburg, Florida, A.R.I., has recently collaborated with Hypereon Labs to enhance AI innovation by securing strategic debt financing. This partnership aims to propel advancements in the field of artificial intelligence and technology. The collaboration is anticipated to not only boost research and development in AI but also enable the companies to leverage their expertise in the sector. This move signals a strong commitment towards technological advancement and signifies the shared vision of both companies to lead in AI innovation.

news.headline: Global dumping hopper market to reach $4.25 billion by 2035, growing at 6.7% CAGR. Steel material dominated with 3% market share in 2025. East Asia and North America expected to show high demand.
news.summary: The global dumping hopper market was valued at US$2,222 million in 2025, with a projected expansion at a CAGR of 6.7% from 2025 to 2035, reaching US$4,249 million by the end of 2035. Factors driving this growth include the increased amount of garbage generated by sectors like manufacturing, construction, and agriculture, leading to higher demand for waste handling equipment. The use of dumping hoppers in material handling processes in various industries is growing rapidly due to technological advancements. Materials used in dumping hopper manufacturing now include stainless steel, MDPE, and various plastics like HDPE and polypropylene, offering solutions to traditional challenges like corrosion. The market saw a 7% CAGR between 2020 and 2024, with steel dominating the market in 2025 with a 3% market share. Discrete manufacturing stood out as the leading end-use vertical with US$578.0 million valuations in 2025. Additionally, demand for dumping hoppers is expected to rise in East Asia and North America, with projected CAGRs of 9% and 6.4%, respectively.

news.headline: State Department Spokesperson: US Secretary of State Rubio and Russian counterpart in talks agreed to set up consultation mechanism to address irritants to US-Russia relationship.
BoE to issue 3-Yr US dollar bond as part of annual FX operation in the near future.
US: US and Russia agree to appoint teams to end Ukraine conflict.
Teledyne FLIR's Black Hornet 4 drone wins DIU's Blue UAS Challenge; evaluated by 3 dozen testers in California.
news.summary: Teledyne FLIR Defense, a division of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY), revealed that its Black Hornet® 4 Personal Reconnaissance System was chosen as a victor in the Blue UAS Refresh initiative. The Defense Innovation Unit (DIU) organized the event, held in November at the Marine Corps Air Ground Combat Center in Twentynine Palms, California. During the event, more than 35 military drone operators evaluated over 35 uncrewed aerial system (UAS) products.

news.headline: Hillman reported record Q4 2024 results, provided 2025 guidance, a leading provider in hardware products, on Nasdaq: HLMN.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Cincinnati, Hillman Solutions Corp. (Nasdaq: HLMN), a prominent hardware products and merchandising solutions provider, disclosed its financial performance for the thirteen and fifty-two weeks concluding on December 28, 2024.

news.headline: Watsco achieves all-time high sales in Q4 with improved margins and cash flow.
Andrew Pidduck appointed as CGO/COO at High Side Technology, bringing 25 years of experience. Formerly President at Forward Slope, Inc.
news.summary: Andrew Pidduck has been appointed as the Chief Growth Officer/Chief Operations Officer at High Side Technology in Charleston, South Carolina. Pidduck, with over 25 years of experience in the Department of Defense, including nearly 20 years in acquisition and contract delivery, brings a wealth of leadership skills and expertise to his new role. Prior to joining HST, Pidduck served as President at Forward Slope, Inc., overseeing significant growth in the company's operations.

news.headline: Russia's Dmitriev: Russian and US delegations have treated each other in respectful manner and as equals.
Investors are placing large bets on a decrease in volatility.
Russia Sovereign Wealth Fund Chief Dmitriev: Early to talk about compromises, the sides started listening to each other.
United Rentals, Inc. (NYSE: URI) no longer pursuing acquisition of H&E Equipment Services, Inc. CEO statement provided.
news.summary: United Rentals, Inc. declared that it will not present a new offer to acquire H&E Equipment Services, Inc. (NYSE: URI), hence allowing H&E to end their merger agreement. Matthew Flannery, the CEO of United Rentals, mentioned that their decision reflects their duty as a management team.

news.headline: Offerpad's CEO, Brian Bair, will chat at Citizens JMP Conference on March 3, 2025; webcast at investor.offerpad.com.
news.summary: Offerpad Solutions Inc. has revealed that its Chairman and CEO, Brian Bair, will be engaging in a fireside chat at the Citizens JMP Technology Conference on March 3, 2025, at 9:30 pm PT. This event will be accessible via live webcast on Offerpad's Investor Relations website at investor.offerpad.com. The discussion will provide insights into the tech-enabled platform for residential real estate. Interested individuals can tune in to the webcast and a replay will be available later.

news.headline: Aduro Clean Technologies will showcase Hydrochemolytic™ tech at 2025 conferences, promoting sustainable plastic recycling.
news.summary: Aduro Clean Technologies has announced plans to feature their innovative Hydrochemolytic™ technology at major conferences in 2025. This technology aims to drive sustainable practices in plastic recycling, contributing to the reduction of plastic waste and environmental impact. By showcasing this technology at key events, Aduro Clean Technologies seeks to raise awareness and promote the adoption of more environmentally friendly solutions in the industry.

news.headline: Chinese Ethereum holder sends $6.8M to urge action against mass mind control, alleging tech enslavement.
news.summary: A programmer from China recently transferred approximately $6.8 million worth of ETH to burn addresses and donations. The individual cited concerns about corporations utilizing mind-control technology to subjugate individuals as the motive behind the act.

news.headline: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited adds $11,199.60 to extend biz combination period by 1 month to March 13, 2025.
news.summary: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: IGTA) deposited $11,199.60 into its trust account on February 12, 2025. This move extends the deadline for completing a business combination by one month, from February 13, 2025, to March 13, 2025. The purpose of this extension is to allow more time for the Company to finalize a business merger or acquisition.

news.headline: SynergenX emphasizes hormone testing for better health in the New Year, detecting imbalances affecting energy, mood, weight.
news.summary: In Houston, SynergenX Health emphasizes the significance of hormone testing in annual medical evaluations as people focus on improving their health and setting new wellness objectives. Hormone testing is a crucial yet often neglected practice that can reveal imbalances affecting energy levels, mood, weight control, and general well-being. Key hormones like testosterone, estrogen, progesterone, and growth factors should be measured to identify potential issues that could greatly influence overall health.

news.headline: Kremlin's Aide Ushakov: The US-Russia talks have finished - IFAX
ProcessUnity launches new Global Risk Exchange with world's largest library of third-party assessment data. #TPRM
news.summary: A company based in Concord, Massachusetts has unveiled the latest iteration of the Global Risk Exchange, which offers access to the largest collection of third-party assessment information globally. This platform by ProcessUnity introduces a significant amount of data to assist organizations in managing risks associated with their third-party relationships.

Extreme Networks authorized $200M for share repurchase over 3 years starting July 1, 2025, with $50M remaining from previous authorization.
news.summary: Extreme Networks, Inc., a prominent player in AI-powered networking automation, revealed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a $200 million common stock repurchase plan set to begin on July 1, 2025, spanning three years. Following a prior approval in May 2022, approximately $50 million remains from that share repurchase authorization, expiring on June 30, 2025. Kevin Rhodes, the Executive Vice President and CFO of Extreme Networks, stated, "We have re...”

news.headline: Asbury Automotive Group to purchase The Herb Chambers Companies in a notable acquisition deal.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 5.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous figure of 6.2%. The economy added 250,000 jobs in the last month, surpassing expectations and indicating a positive trend in the labor market. This increase in employment opportunities has been largely attributed to growth in the manufacturing and hospitality sectors. Additionally, the average hourly wage saw a notable rise of 3.5% compared to the same period last year, reaching $27.50. These latest statistics suggest a strengthening economy and a promising outlook for job seekers.

news.headline: GameStop plans to sell its French and Canadian operations as part of evaluating international assets.
news.summary: A recent announcement made by GameStop Corp. (NYSE: GME) indicates that the company, based in Grapevine, Texas, is looking into potential asset sales as part of its international evaluation. Specifically, GameStop plans to sell its operations in France and Canada. This decision signifies a strategic move by the Company to streamline its international portfolio and potentially reallocate resources.

news.headline: Arch Biopartners has received NOL from Health Canada for PONTiAK trial using Cilastatin for AKI prevention.
news.summary: In Toronto on February 18, 2025, Arch Biopartners Inc. disclosed that their clinical team overseeing the upcoming investigator-led trial known as “Prevention Of NephroToxin Induced Acute Kidney Injury with Cilastatin” (PONTiAK) has obtained a No Objection Letter (NOL) from Health Canada, permitting them to move forward with the trial. The company is traded on TSX Venture under ARCH and on OTCQB under ACHFF. This development marks a significant milestone for the Company and the trial, indicating progress towards conducting the study efficiently.

news.headline: Align Capital Partners announces completion of recapitalization of AKS Engineering, providing services to clients in the Pacific Northwest, with over 350 employees.
news.summary: A private equity firm, Align Capital Partners (ACP), has successfully carried out the recapitalization of AKS Engineering, a consulting firm based in Tualatin, OR. This company, established in 1996, offers various services including civil engineering, surveying, natural resources, permitting, and planning to both private and public clients across the Pacific Northwest region. With a workforce of more than 350 individuals, AKS Engineering operates not only from its headquarters but also from six additional locations. This recent transaction marks a significant development in the company's growth and expansion plans.

news.headline: "United Natural Foods to release Q2 fiscal 2025 results on March 11, 2025. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET. Call (888) 660-6768."
news.summary: United Natural Foods, Inc. (NYSE: UNFI) is set to announce financial results for the 13-week fiscal 2025 second quarter, concluded on February 1, 2025. The report is scheduled for release on Tuesday, March 11, 2025. A conference call will follow at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day for discussing the outcomes. If interested in joining the call, dial (888) 660 - 6768 (U.S. toll-free) and provide the conference ID number 1099581. Additionally, an audio webcast of the conference call, along with related materials, will be available for reference.

news.headline: Oncolytics Biotech® strengthens pipeline with advances in pancreatic, anal cancer and metastatic breast cancer, showcasing efficacy signals.
news.summary: New clinical data presentations reveal promising results in hard-to-treat gastrointestinal (GI) cancers, along with significant efficacy in breast cancer, showcasing the versatility of pelareorep in treating diverse tumor types. The presentations took place in San Diego and Calgary, Alberta on Feb. 18, 2025. This highlights the potential of pelareorep as a treatment option, with the data pointing towards its efficacy across different cancer types.

news.headline: Rajat Rana rejoins Quinn Emanuel as partner in New York office, bringing expertise in international litigation.
news.summary: Renowned expert Rajat Rana has rejoined Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, LLP, a global leader in litigation, as a partner in their New York office. With unparalleled experience in international litigation and arbitration, Rana brings valuable insights to the firm. This move comes as the legal industry continues to evolve, with firms seeking top talent to navigate complex cases. Rana's return underscores the firm's commitment to excellence and growth in this competitive landscape.

news.headline: Harts Plumbing, Electricians, & HVAC Technicians in Pacific Northwest remind homeowners to prioritize natural gas safety.
news.summary: A well-known home services provider in the Pacific Northwest is reminding residents not to overlook natural gas safety even as winter comes to a close. Harts Plumbers, Electricians & HVAC Technicians, based in Tacoma, Washington, issued the warning on February 18, 2025. The company is a highly regarded service provider in western Washington.

news.headline: eRank's 2024 Etsy Buyer Survey unveils crucial insights for handmade sellers to thrive in 2025.
news.summary: Key information for handmade sellers to thrive in 2025 has been released in Cleveland on Feb. 18, 2025. The latest data from the 2024 Etsy Buyer Survey, provided by eRank, the top platform for Etsy SEO and trend analysis, reveals valuable insights into the preferences of Etsy shoppers. This information is crucial for sellers aiming to stay competitive in the market.

news.headline: Bowman Consulting (NASDAQ: BWMN) expands oil and gas footprint by acquiring UP Engineering in Texas.
news.summary: Bowman Consulting Group Ltd. disclosed that it will be acquiring San Antonio-based firm UP Engineering, known for its expertise in civil engineering and survey services, via a definitive purchase agreement. UP Engineering operates primarily in Texas, catering to various sectors such as oil and gas, industrial, commercial, and residential projects. This partnership signifies a strategic move for Bowman, a nationwide engineering services company, listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under ticker symbol BWMN.

news.headline: Herc Holdings confirms proposal to acquire H&E Equipment Services with the go-shop provision, challenging United Rentals' previous agreement.
news.summary: Herc Holdings Inc., a prominent equipment rental supplier in North America, has officially finalized a binding acquisition proposal and merger agreement with H&E Equipment Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: HEES). The agreement was made following the "go-shop" clause in H&E's initial deal with United Rentals, Inc. (NYSE: URI). Herc Holdings Inc.'s transaction with H&E Equipment Services, Inc. involved discussions with the latter's Board of Directors. This announcement marks a significant development in the equipment rental industry.
